MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-13-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501
REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT''S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 24, 2015 ON COURT''S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-24-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT 11TH & KISSLING STREET TRUST AND RAY SHAHANI'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. BASED ON BROAD-STROKE ALLEGATIONS IN COMPLAINT "THROUGHOUT THE YEAR 2014, PLAINTIFF RECEIVED MULTIPLE VERBAL COMMUNICATIONS FROM DEFENDANT SHAHANI TO INFLUENCE OR ATTEMPT TO INFLUENCE PLAINTIFF TO VACATE THE PREMISES THROUGH FRAUD, INTIMIDATION, AND/OR COERCION," IT WAS NOT "TOTALLY AND COMPLETELY WITHOUT MERIT" FOR DEFENDANT TO INFER THAT THE COMPLAINT ARISES OUT OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY OCCURRING AFTER OCTOBER 22, 2014 AS DESCRIBED IN SHAHANI DECLARATION. PER PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION, THE ALLEGED WRONGDOINGS OCCURRING AFTER OCTOBER 22, 2014 (ON OR ABOUT THIS DAY SHAHANI DECIDED TO PURSUE UNLAWFUL DETAINER) AND GIVING RISE TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT ARE NOT PROTECTED ACTIVITIES WITHIN THE MEANING OF CCP 425.16. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT N ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: R. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: R. GOULDING

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend Deposition In San Francisco
Off Calendar May-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Edward Singer, Jr. (650)393-5862 for Defendant/Moving party 11th and Kissling Street Trust.
Carlos Jato, (415)771-6174 for Plaintiff/Opposing party clara Triare.

Counsel for both parties inform the Cort they have agreed on a deposition date. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT 11TH AND KISSLING STREET TRUST, RAY SHAHANI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend Deposition In San Francisco is GRANTED. Parties agreed to hold the deposition on May 16, 2016. at 9:00am. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances

DEFENDANT 11TH & KISSLING STREET TRUST and RAY SHAHANI's Special Motion To Strike

The Court adopts the tentative ruling:

DEFENDANT 11TH & KISSLING STREET TRUST and RAY SHAHANI's Special Motion To Strike is DENIED. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is DENIED. Based on broad-stroke allegations in complaint "throughout the year 2014, plaintiff received multiple verbal communications from defendant Shahani to influence or attempt to influence plaintiff to vacate the Premises through fraud, intimidation, and/or coercion," it was not "totally and completely without merit" for Defendant to infer that the complaint arises out of protected activity occurring after October 22, 2014 as described in Shahani declaration. Per Plaintiff's declaration, the alleged wrongdoings occurring after October 22, 2014 (on or about this day Shahani decided to pursue unlawful detainer) and giving rise to Plaintiff's complaint are not protected activities within the meaning of CCP 425.16.
Prevailing party is to submit n order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: R. Quidachay; Clerk: R. Goulding
